${ModID}:PortalSicknessPower.NAME: Portal Sickness
DESCRIPTIONS: Does #b%d damage to you in #b%d turns. NL Additional stacks will add their damage to this.
Does #b%d damage to you at the end of this turn. NL Additional stacks will add their damage to this.

${ModID}:BootlegPortalFluidPower.NAME: Bootleg Portal Fluid
DESCRIPTIONS: At the start of your turn, gain 1 Strength for each distinct debuff you have. NL Gain 1 additional Strength for each debuff with more than 5 stacks.
